name: skymp-launcher
description: Customizable launcher template for SkyMP multiplayer servers
author: F02K

scripts.test: npm run build:app && node --test test/*.test.js && tsx --test test/app/*.test.ts
scripts.lint: eslint src/app test/app e2e scripts/build.mjs playwright.config.ts
scripts.format:check: prettier --check src/app test/app e2e scripts package.json launcher.config.json launcher.config.schema.json playwright.config.ts
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm test && npm run validate:config
scripts.build: npm run build:app && npm run validate:config && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.js
scripts.build:win: npm run build:app && npm run validate:config && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.js --win
scripts.build:linux: npm run build:app && npm run validate:config && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.js --linux
scripts.build:mac: npm run build:app && npm run validate:config && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.js --mac
